LAW AND MOTION 301, DEFENDANT THE ROYAL TOWERS APARTMENT CORPORATION'S DEMURRER TO FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED WITH 10 DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND. PLAINTIFF'S OPPOSITION RELIES ON FACTS BEYOND WHAT IS PLEADED IN THE COMPLAINT, WHICH, AS STATED, FAILS TO PLEAD HOW DEFENDANT'S CONDUCT FOR WHICH IT COULD BE HELD LIABLE HOW IT CAUSED PLAINTIFF'S INJURIES. PREVAILING PARTY IS TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR# 8189

Off Calendar May-01-2008 Sustained
MINI MINUTES:

NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS:
DEFENDANT THE ROYAL TOWERS APARTMENT CORPORATION'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED WITH 10 DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND. PLAINTIFF'S OPPOSITION RELIES ON FACTS BEYOND WHAT IS PLEADED IN THE COMPLAINT, WHICH, AS STATED, FAILS TO PLEAD HOW DEFENDANT'S CONDUCT FOR WHICH IT COULD BE HELD LIABLE HOW IT CAUSED PLAINTIFF'S INJURIES. Prevailing party is to prepare a form of order. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR# 8189 =301/PJB/AL
